item.title: [Daily] Skills.sh snapshot (2026-03-14)
item.description: Daily snapshot. Providers: skills.sh All Time skills: 51837 Trending skills: 20794 Hot skills: 3385 Top All Time: find-skills (536640) Top Trending: find-skills (16038) Top Hot: ai-video-generation (552)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#10): flutter-setting-up-on-windows
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #10 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Sets up a Windows environment for Flutter development. Use when configuring a Windows machine to run, build, or deploy Flutter applications for Windows desktop or Android.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#12): flutter-architecting-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #12 Installs: 35 Source: flutter/skills Description: Architects a Flutter application using the recommended layered approach (UI, Logic, Data). Use when structuring a new project or refactoring for scalability.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#13): flutter-theming-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #13 Installs: 34 Source: flutter/skills Description: Customizes the visual appearance of a Flutter app using the theming system. Use when defining global styles, colors, or typography for an application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#14): flutter-testing-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #14 Installs: 34 Source: flutter/skills Description: Implements unit, widget, and integration tests for a Flutter app. Use when ensuring code quality and preventing regressions through automated testing.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#15): flutter-caching-data
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #15 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Implements caching strategies for Flutter apps to improve performance and offline support. Use when retaining app data locally to reduce network requests or speed up startup.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#16): flutter-building-plugins
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #16 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Builds Flutter plugins that provide native interop for other apps to use. Use when creating reusable packages that bridge Flutter with platform-specific functionality.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#17): flutter-handling-http-and-json
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #17 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Executes HTTP requests and handles JSON serialization in a Flutter app. Use when integrating with REST APIs or parsing structured data from external sources.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#18): flutter-interoperating-with-native-apis
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #18 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Interoperates with native platform APIs on Android, iOS, and the web. Use when accessing device-specific features not available in Dart or calling existing native code.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#19): flutter-embedding-native-views
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #19 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Embeds native Android, iOS, or macOS views into a Flutter app. Use when integrating complex native components like maps or web views.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#20): flutter-setting-up-on-linux
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #20 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Sets up a Linux environment for Flutter development. Use when configuring a Linux machine to run, build, or deploy Flutter applications.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#21): flutter-adding-home-screen-widgets
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #21 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Adds home screen widgets to a Flutter app for Android and iOS. Use when providing glanceable app information or quick actions on the device home screen.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#22): flutter-localizing-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #22 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Configures a Flutter app to support multiple languages and regions. Use when preparing an application for international markets and diverse user locales.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#23): flutter-improving-accessibility
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #23 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Configures a Flutter app to support assistive technologies like Screen Readers. Use when ensuring an application is usable for people with disabilities.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#24): flutter-building-forms
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #24 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Builds Flutter forms with validation and user input handling. Use when creating login screens, data entry forms, or any multi-field user input.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#28): flutter-animating-apps
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #28 Installs: 34 Source: flutter/skills Description: Implements animated effects, transitions, and motion in a Flutter app. Use when adding visual feedback, shared element transitions, or physics-based animations.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#3): flutter-building-layouts
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #3 Installs: 36 Source: flutter/skills Description: Builds Flutter layouts using the constraint system and layout widgets. Use when creating or refining the UI structure of a Flutter application.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#35): web-accessibility
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #35 Installs: 17 Source: supercent-io/skills-template Description: Implement web accessibility (a11y) standards following WCAG 2.1 guidelines. Use when building accessible UIs, fixing accessibility issues, or ensuring compliance with disability standards. Handles ARIA attributes, keyboard navigation, screen readers, semantic HTML, and accessibility testing.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#36): wrangler
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #36 Installs: 16 Source: cloudflare/skills Description: Cloudflare Workers CLI for deploying, developing, and managing Workers, KV, R2, D1, Vectorize, Hyperdrive, Workers AI, Containers, Queues, Workflows, Pipelines, and Secrets Store. Load before running wrangler commands to ensure correct syntax and best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#37): cloudflare
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #37 Installs: 16 Source: cloudflare/skills Description: Comprehensive Cloudflare platform skill covering Workers, Pages, storage (KV, D1, R2), AI (Workers AI, Vectorize, Agents SDK), networking (Tunnel, Spectrum), security (WAF, DDoS), and infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, Pulumi). Use for any Cloudflare development task.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#38): notion-api
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #38 Installs: 16 Source: intellectronica/agent-skills Description: This skill provides comprehensive instructions for interacting with the Notion API via REST calls. This skill should be used whenever the user asks to interact with Notion, including reading, creating, updating, or deleting pages, databases, blocks, comments, or any other Notion content. The skill covers authentication, all available endpoints, pagination, error handling, and best practices.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#39): refactor
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #39 Installs: 11 Source: github/awesome-copilot Description: Surgical code refactoring to improve maintainability without changing behavior. Covers extracting functions, renaming variables, breaking down god functions, improving type safety, eliminating code smells, and applying design patterns. Less drastic than repo-rebuilder; use for gradual improvements.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#4): flutter-managing-state
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #4 Installs: 35 Source: flutter/skills Description: Manages application and ephemeral state in a Flutter app. Use when sharing data between widgets or handling complex UI state transitions.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#40): lead-magnets
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 9 Source: coreyhaines31/marketingskills Description: When the user wants to create, plan, or optimize a lead magnet for email capture or lead generation. Also use when the user mentions "lead magnet," "gated content," "content upgrade," "downloadable," "ebook," "cheat sheet," "checklist," "template download," "opt-in," "freebie," "PDF download," "resource library," "content offer," "email capture content," "Notion template," "spreadsheet template," or "what should I give away for emails." Use this for planning what to create and how to distribute it. For interactive tools as lead magnets, see free-tool-strategy. For writing the actual content, see copywriting. For the email sequence after capture, see email-sequence.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#41): chrome-cdp
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 8 Source: pasky/chrome-cdp-skill Description: Interact with local Chrome browser session (only on explicit user approval after being asked to inspect, debug, or interact with a page open in Chrome)

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#42): ai-sdk
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 19 Source: vercel/ai Description: Answer questions about the AI SDK and help build AI-powered features. Use when developers: (1) Ask about AI SDK functions like generateText, streamText, ToolLoopAgent, embed, or tools, (2) Want to build AI agents, chatbots, RAG systems, or text generation features, (3) Have questions about AI providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, etc.), streaming, tool calling, structured output, or embeddings, (4) Use React hooks like useChat or useCompletion. Triggers on: "AI SDK", "Vercel AI SDK", "generateText", "streamText", "add AI to my app", "build an agent", "tool calling", "structured output", "useChat".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#43): next-cache-components
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 15 Source: vercel-labs/next-skills Description: Next.js 16 Cache Components - PPR, use cache directive, cacheLife, cacheTag, updateTag

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#44): agent-fetch
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 7 Source: teng-lin/agent-fetch Description: Fetch and extract full article content from URLs. Returns complete text with structure (headings, links, lists) instead of summaries. 7 extraction strategies, browser impersonation, 200-700ms.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#46): vitest
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 15 Source: antfu/skills Description: A blazing fast unit testing framework powered by Vite

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#47): tts
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 6 Source: marswaveai/skills Description: Text-to-speech and voice narration. Triggers on: "朗读这段", "配音", "TTS", "语音合成", "text to speech", "read this aloud", "convert to speech", "voice narration", "read aloud".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#48): asr
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 6 Source: marswaveai/skills Description: Transcribe audio files to text using local speech recognition. Triggers on: "转录", "transcribe", "语音转文字", "ASR", "识别音频", "把这段音频转成文字".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#49): content-parser
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #49 Installs: 6 Source: marswaveai/skills Description: Extract and parse content from URLs. Triggers on: user provides a URL to extract content from, another skill needs to parse source material, "parse this URL", "extract content", "解析链接", "提取内容".

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#5): flutter-implementing-navigation-and-routing
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #5 Installs: 35 Source: flutter/skills Description: Handles routing, navigation, and deep linking in a Flutter application. Use when moving between screens or setting up URL-based navigation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#50): baoyu-danger-gemini-web
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #50 Installs: 20 Source: jimliu/baoyu-skills Description: Generates images and text via reverse-engineered Gemini Web API. Supports text generation, image generation from prompts, reference images for vision input, and multi-turn conversations. Use when other skills need image generation backend, or when user requests "generate image with Gemini", "Gemini text generation", or needs vision-capable AI generation.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#6): flutter-handling-concurrency
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #6 Installs: 34 Source: flutter/skills Description: Executes long-running tasks in background isolates to keep the UI responsive. Use when performing heavy computations or parsing large datasets.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#7): flutter-reducing-app-size
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #7 Installs: 34 Source: flutter/skills Description: Measures and optimizes the size of Flutter application bundles for deployment. Use when minimizing download size or meeting app store package constraints.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#8): flutter-working-with-databases
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #8 Installs: 34 Source: flutter/skills Description: Manages local data persistence using SQLite or other database solutions. Use when a Flutter app needs to store, query, or synchronize large amounts of structured data on the device.

item.title: [Hot] New entry (#9): flutter-setting-up-on-macos
item.description: New entry in Hot leaderboard. Rank: #9 Installs: 33 Source: flutter/skills Description: Sets up a macOS environment for Flutter development. Use when configuring a macOS machine to run, build, or deploy Flutter applications for iOS or macOS.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#40): ui-ux-pro-max
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #40 Installs: 1888 Source: nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill Description: UI/UX design intelligence. 50 styles, 21 palettes, 50 font pairings, 20 charts, 9 stacks (React, Next.js, Vue, Svelte, SwiftUI, React Native, Flutter, Tailwind, shadcn/ui). Actions: plan, build, create, design, implement, review, fix, improve, optimize, enhance, refactor, check UI/UX code. Projects: website, landing page, dashboard, admin panel, e-commerce, SaaS, portfolio, blog, mobile app, .html, .tsx, .vue, .svelte. Elements: button, modal, navbar, sidebar, card, table, form, chart. Styles: glassmorphism, claymorphism, minimalism, brutalism, neumorphism, bento grid, dark mode, responsive, skeuomorphism, flat design. Topics: color palette, accessibility, animation, layout, typography, font pairing, spacing, hover, shadow, gradient. Integrations: shadcn/ui MCP for component search and examples.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#41): web-search
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #41 Installs: 1862 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Web search and content extraction with Tavily and Exa via inference.sh CLI. Apps: Tavily Search, Tavily Extract, Exa Search, Exa Answer, Exa Extract. Capabilities: AI-powered search, content extraction, direct answers, research. Use for: research, RAG pipelines, fact-checking, content aggregation, agents. Triggers: web search, tavily, exa, search api, content extraction, research, internet search, ai search, search assistant, web scraping, rag, perplexity alternative

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#42): brainstorming
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #42 Installs: 1796 Source: obra/superpowers Description: You MUST use this before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#43): agent-browser
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #43 Installs: 1779 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Browser automation for AI agents via inference.sh. Navigate web pages, interact with elements using @e refs, take screenshots, record video. Capabilities: web scraping, form filling, clicking, typing, drag-drop, file upload, JavaScript execution. Use for: web automation, data extraction, testing, agent browsing, research. Triggers: browser, web automation, scrape, navigate, click, fill form, screenshot, browse web, playwright, headless browser, web agent, surf internet, record video

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#44): python-executor
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #44 Installs: 1777 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Execute Python code in a safe sandboxed environment via [inference.sh](https://inference.sh). Pre-installed: NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, requests, BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Playwright, MoviePy, Pillow, OpenCV, trimesh, and 100+ more libraries. Use for: data processing, web scraping, image manipulation, video creation, 3D model processing, PDF generation, API calls, automation scripts. Triggers: python, execute code, run script, web scraping, data analysis, image processing, video editing, 3D models, automation, pandas, matplotlib

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#45): javascript-sdk
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #45 Installs: 1775 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, integrate 150+ models. Package: @inferencesh/sdk (npm install). Full TypeScript support, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, human approval. Use for: JavaScript integration, TypeScript, Node.js, React, Next.js, frontend apps. Triggers: javascript sdk, typescript sdk, npm install, node.js api, js client, react ai, next.js ai, frontend sdk, @inferencesh/sdk, typescript agent, browser sdk, js integration

item.title: [Trending] New entry (#46): tools-ui
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #46 Installs: 1774 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Tool lifecycle UI components for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Display tool calls: pending, progress, approval required, results. Capabilities: tool status, progress indicators, approval flows, results display. Use for: showing agent tool calls, human-in-the-loop approvals, tool output. item.title: [Trending] New entry (#47): widgets-ui
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #47 Installs: 1774 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Declarative UI widgets from JSON for React/Next.js from ui.inference.sh. Use for: agent-generated UIs, dynamic forms, data display, interactive cards. item.title: [Trending] New entry (#48): python-sdk
item.description: New entry in Trending leaderboard. Rank: #48 Installs: 1773 Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Python SDK for inference.sh - run AI apps, build agents, and integrate with 150+ models. Package: inferencesh (pip install inferencesh). Supports sync/async, streaming, file uploads. Build agents with template or ad-hoc patterns, tool builder API, skills, and human approval. Use for: Python integration, AI apps, agent development, RAG pipelines, automation. item.title: [Trending] New entry (#50): agent-ui

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (1 → 2): ai-image-generation
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #1 Current rank: #2 Delta: -1 Installs: 557 (prev 616) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Generate AI images with FLUX, Gemini, Grok, Seedream, Reve and 50+ models via inference.sh CLI. Models: FLUX Dev LoRA, FLUX.2 Klein LoRA, Gemini 3 Pro Image, Grok Imagine, Seedream 4.5, Reve, ImagineArt. Capabilities: text-to-image, image-to-image, inpainting, LoRA, image editing, upscaling, text rendering. Use for: AI art, product mockups, concept art, social media graphics, marketing visuals, illustrations. Triggers: flux, image generation, ai image, text to image, stable diffusion, generate image, ai art, midjourney alternative, dall-e alternative, text2img, t2i, image generator, ai picture, create image with ai, generative ai, ai illustration, grok image, gemini image

item.title: [Hot] Rank down (10 → 34): infsh-cli
item.description: Hot leaderboard rank change. Previous rank: #10 Current rank: #34 Delta: -24 Installs: 543 (prev 611) Source: inferen-sh/skills Description: Run 150+ AI apps via inference.sh CLI - image generation, video creation, LLMs, search, 3D, Twitter automation. Models: FLUX, Veo, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Seedance, OmniHuman, Tavily, Exa, OpenRouter, and many more. Use when running AI apps, generating images/videos, calling LLMs, web search, or automating Twitter. Triggers: inference.sh, infsh, ai model, run ai, serverless ai, ai api, flux, veo, claude api, image generation, video generation, openrouter, tavily, exa search, twitter api, grok
